commit.message:
fix: proteger bat contra auto-modificación por git pull

El bat se copiaba mal porque git pull modificaba el archivo mientras
CMD lo ejecutaba por posición de bytes. Ahora:
- Trampolín: copia el bat a TEMP antes de ejecutar
- Título temporal "[Iniciando]" para no matarse a sí mismo
- Filtro correcto "Actualizar y Abrir*" para cerrar terminal anterior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Update README with simplified npx usage, bump to v1.0.1

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: empty struct default causing parseError in getObjectDetails (#242)

* fix: empty struct default causing parseError in OpenFeature getObjectDetails

An empty Value.structure([:]) passed as default to getObjectDetails
would cause a parseError due to Swift's covariant empty dictionary
casting allowing [String: Any] to match [String: ConfidenceValue].

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* test: add empty [String: Any] default evaluation test

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: real trending from YouTube (no key) and X/Twitter (no paid API)

YouTube:
- Replace YouTube Data API v3 with youtubei.js (wraps InnerTube private API)
- Zero API key needed, completely free
- Defensive parsing handles multiple youtubei.js response structures

X/Twitter:
- Add @treasure-dev/twitter-scraper (maintained fork of the-convocation)
- getTrends() via cookie/password auth, no paid API required
- Module-level scraper cache for warm invocations
- Falls back gracefully with setup guide if credentials not configured
- Supports TWITTER_COOKIES env var for faster cookie-based auth

Config:
- serverExternalPackages for youtubei.js and twitter-scraper (ESM compat)
- Topics page: X tab now real (4 tabs total), shows setup warning on first use

commit.message:
Move page-break control to JS to reliably prevent blank last page

CSS page-break-after:avoid was being ignored by Chrome. Instead,
page breaks are now applied in JS only to non-last grids, so there
is never a forced break after the final grid. Also switched @page
margin to explicit 10mm and grid height to 277mm to match exactly.

fix(history): incluir mensagens outbound no histórico

Filtro m.wamid <> wamid excluía outbound (wamid IS NULL).

Fix: (m.wamid IS NULL OR m.wamid <> wamid_atual)

prevents XSS in interpolated attributes.

thinking/tool activity before question messages are posted. This

+ finishTool() before the MCP permission handler posts the question
messages.

commit.message:
Fix director age/tenure columns in Top 30 Profiles and Director Contacts

- build_top30(): handle both 'age' (ch_enrich format) and 'age_est'
  (enrich_batch format) for director age display
- build_top30(): derive years_active from appointed date when not stored
  directly (enrich_batch only stores appointed date, not years_active)
- build_top30(): fall back to role field when occupation is absent
- build_contacts(): fix age field to handle both 'age' and 'age_est'
- build_contacts(): when director_contacts is empty (Deep OCR runs where
  ch_contacts enrichment is not called), fall back to raw directors list
  and show CH data with a note that email enrichment was not performed

Angle Protocol passed AIP-112 (March 2026) to orderly wind down both

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add 3 new scenarios and internet outage simulation

- RemoteStart (idx 3): server-initiated charging via RemoteStartTransaction
- RemoteStop (idx 5): server-initiated stop via RemoteStopTransaction
- Unplug (idx 6): EVDisconnected stop without explicit user action
- Internet toggle button: shows broken lines, offline SVG indicator, greys out backend
- All req/res/push/err functions are now offline-aware: packets queue at network boundary when offline, full callback chain pauses, resumes on reconnect
- Scenarios refactored from independent sched() timers to callback chains so downstream steps only fire after upstream packets actually arrive

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix blank second print page by replacing 100vh with explicit A4 height

100vh in Chrome's print context equals the full page height (297mm),
not the content area. With 5% @page margins (~14.85mm each), the grid
was overflowing ~30mm onto a second blank page. Using 267mm (297mm minus
both margins) keeps content within the page boundary.

commit.message:
Fix roundtable SSE race condition: poll for pending streams

The SSE endpoint assumed no emitter meant the stream had already completed.
For roundtable entities 2+, the stream hasn't started yet (waiting for
their turn). Now checks DB status: if still 'streaming' with no emitter,
polls until the emitter appears or the DB status changes. 200ms poll
interval, 2-minute timeout.

commit.message:
Fix linker error: guard leia_dp_factory_vk with XRT_HAVE_LEIA_SR_VULKAN

The Vulkan display processor factory is only compiled when
SimulatedRealityVulkanBeta.lib is found. Guard the reference in
target_instance.c so it doesn't cause an unresolved external when
the Vulkan weaver is not available.
